title: Plain vanilla three-month ETF momentum baseline
mechanism: Medium-term price momentum can persist across liquid macro ETFs because investors underreact to changing growth, inflation, rate, and risk-appetite regimes.
oos_hypothesis: A plain 63-trading-day price-momentum baseline provides the reference validation-CAGR strategy; locked OOS CAGR is only a test metric.
falsification: Reject as a baseline candidate if it crashes, ruins, or has non-positive validation CAGR.
references: Jegadeesh and Titman (1993), Returns to Buying Winners and Selling Losers;Moskowitz, Ooi, and Pedersen (2012), Time Series Momentum
